## Epic

Quality and Delivery

## Description

- Build internal release checklist page for QA/UAT status
- Include sections for functional checks, visual checks, and known issues
- Add sign-off fields for product, design, and engineering
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Checklist rows with status chips and assignee fields
  - Exportable summary for release notes
  - Desktop and mobile views retain readability

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Checklist page complete and usable by team
- [ ] Sign-off flow defined and documented
- [ ] Export summary available
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for all checklist states

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `release`, `priority-medium`
